title: KKR Completes Sale of Minnesota Rubber and Plastics
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KKR, a leading global investment firm, today announced that KKR has completed the previously announced sale of Minnesota Rubber and Plastics (“MRP” or “the Company”), a leading provider of materials science-based elastomer and thermoplastic solutions, to Trelleborg Group (“Trelleborg”), a leader in engineered polymer solutions.

title: KKR to Acquire Ness Digital Engineering
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KKR to Acquire Ness Digital Engineering

title: Mubadala and KKR Enter into a Strategic Partnership to Invest in Private Credit in Asia Pacific
text: HONG KONG & ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mubadala and KKR Enter into a Strategic Partnership to Invest in Private Credit in Asia Pacific

title: KKR Joins UPL as an Investor in Advanta
text: MUMBAI, India--(BUSINESS WIRE)--KKR, a leading global investment firm, and UPL Limited (“UPL”), a global agriculture solutions provider, today announced the signing of definitive agreements under which KKR will invest US$300 million for a 13.33% stake in Advanta Enterprises Limited (“Advanta” or “the Company”), a subsidiary of UPL and a leading global seed company that aims to deliver innovative farming solutions and technology to farmers around the world.

title: SkinSpirit Announces Investment from KKR
text: SEATTLE--(BUSINESS WIRE)--SkinSpirit announces investment from KKR to accelerate national growth and talent development.

title: Apax Funds to Sell Boasso Global to KKR
text: NEW YORK & TAMPA, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Funds advised by Apax Partners LLP (“Apax Funds”) and KKR, a leading global investment firm, today announced the signing of a definitive agreement under which the Apax Funds will sell their majority interest in Boasso Global, Inc. (“Boasso” or the “Company”), a premier provider of depot, maintenance, cleaning, and transportation services for the ISO tank container industry in North America and Europe, to KKR.
